config.title:
#if appvar_rejestr_typ = N5REJESTRDOK_KASOWY Raport kasowy #endif
#if appvar_rejestr_typ = N5REJESTRDOK_BANKOWY Raport bankowy #endif
#ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
#include "50600"
'std_choice_list_hli #include "50200"
'section_fclose #include "50222"
'getCurrentFirma #include "50203"
'bulidplatrow #include "50634"
'rebuild_operation_buttons #include "50128"
dim g_currIdobj:g_currIdobj = clng(0)
function fopen:fopen = std_fopen() #ifdef APPCONFIG_SHOW_ALL_DOKUM trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM) = -1 #endif
section_fopen THIS_FILE
if not page_.cursoriter is nothing then page_.root.ignore=true std_flast() end if
g_currIdobj = page_.root.idobj fill_dok_table fill_podsumowanie
rebuild_configuration
end function
private sub rebuild_configuration dim pConfigObject : set pConfigObject = nothing dim pConfigModule : set pConfigModule = nothing rebuild_operation_buttons_ex page_.root.raka_pRejestrDok,CTRLID_OPERATIONS_ROW, pConfigObject, pConfigModule , 2 end sub
function on_record_change if g_currIdobj = page_.root.idobj then exit function else g_currIdobj = page_.root.idobj end if fill_dok_table fill_podsumowanie end function
function fill_podsumowanie dim curP, curR page_.root.n5rapkas_get_podsumowanie curP , curR ' page_.ctrl(CTRLID_PRZYCHODY).text = "Suma przychodów w walucie firmy: " + trans_.afc.display.money(curP,getCurrentFirma().pWaluta.strSkrot) ' page_.ctrl(CTRLID_ROZCHODY).text = "Suma rozchodów w walucie firmy: " + trans_.afc.display.money(curR,getCurrentFirma().pWaluta.strSkrot) end function
dim g_cursor
function c1000_ondataentered(pCtrl,value):c1000_ondataentered = true 'msgbox cstr(g_cursor.get(pCtrl.userprop(1)).text) c1000_ondataentered = (g_cursor).exists(pCtrl.userprop(1)) pCtrl.disable = not c1000_ondataentered if c1000_ondataentered then cust_rs_dataentered_obj pCtrl,value,(g_cursor).get(pCtrl.userprop(1)),"strNazwa","pSchematDekr"," pRejestrDok="+cstr(trans_.var(APPVAR_REJESTR_DOKUMENTOW)) + " and eAktywny=N5SCHEMATDEKR_AKTYWNY" end if end function
function c1000_ongetdata(pCtrl):c1000_ongetdata = true if (g_cursor).exists(pCtrl.userprop(1)) then pCtrl.disable=false cust_rs_getdata_obj pCtrl,(g_cursor).get(pCtrl.userprop(1)).field("pSchematDekr"),"strNazwa",true else pCtrl.disable=true pCtrl.value = "" end if end function
function c2000_ondataentered(pCtrl,value):c2000_ondataentered = true 'msgbox cstr(g_cursor.get(pCtrl.userprop(1)).text) c2000_ondataentered = (g_cursor).exists(pCtrl.userprop(1)) pCtrl.disable = not c2000_ondataentered if c2000_ondataentered then cust_rs_dataentered_obj pCtrl,value,(g_cursor).get(pCtrl.userprop(1)),"strNrDok","pDowodKsieg","" end if end function
function c2000_ongetdata(pCtrl):c2000_ongetdata = true if (g_cursor).exists(pCtrl.userprop(1)) then pCtrl.disable=false cust_rs_getdata_obj pCtrl,(g_cursor).get(pCtrl.userprop(1)).field("pDowodKsieg"),"strNrDok",true else pCtrl.disable=true pCtrl.value = "" end if end function
function row_choose_schem_dekre(hli) if not g_cursor.exists(hli.prop(1)) then exit function end if dim dok:set dok = g_cursor.get(hli.prop(1)) std_choice_field_crsr dok , "pSchematDekr" ,"", "strNazwa" , CRSR_SCHEMAT_AKTYWNY_PO_REJESTRACH , TYPEID_N5SCHEMATDEKR , nothing end function
function row_choose_dowod_ksieg(hli) if not g_cursor.exists(hli.prop(1)) then exit function end if dim dok:set dok = g_cursor.get(hli.prop(1)) std_choice_field_crsr dok , "pDowodKsieg" ,"", "strNrDok" , 1 , TYPEID_N5DOWODKSIEG , nothing end function
function fill_dok_table dim pTab,platnosc page_.ctrl(CTRLID_TABLE_RESULT).removeall set g_cursor = page_.root.n5rapkas_get_platnosci() g_cursor.forwardonly = false doc_.getmodule(60166).plug_platnosci page_.ctrl(CTRLID_TABLE_RESULT), g_cursor , 0 , true , true , true , true , true , true , true , page_ , 1000 , 2000 , true , 0 end function
function c##CTRLID_TRIGGER##_ongetdata(byref pCtrl):c##CTRLID_TRIGGER##_ongetdata = true on_record_change end function
function fsave
#ifdef ENABLE_DB11_PLATNOSCI_FIFO if not doc_.getmodule(60253).pt_ensure_accuracy_ui(true) then 'trans_.message 7000, 0, "Niepoprawny stan płatności" end if #endif dim hli: set hli = doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='cust_operation_hli' vn1='STD_OPERATION_FSAVE'") std_cust_operation_hli_ex hli,page_.root.raka_pRejestrDok,page_.root,2,page_
end function
function fclose section_fclose THIS_FILE end function
function cust_operation_hli(byref pHLI) std_cust_operation_hli_ex pHLI,page_.root.raka_pRejestrDok,page_.root,2,page_ end function
function foptions FORCE_REALOAD_OBJECT(page_.root.raka_pRejestrDok)
if doc_.getmodule(60175).dok_rej_preferences_ex(page_.root.raka_pRejestrDok.idobj,TYPEID_N5RAPKAS,2) then
FORCE_REALOAD_OBJECT(page_.root.raka_pRejestrDok)
'apply settings rebuild_configuration end if end function
QVE_NRDOK_FROM_REJESTR(CTRLID_NUMDOK,raka_pRejestrDok,raka_strNrDok)
function c##CTRLID_NUMDOK##_ongetdata(byref pCtrl): c##CTRLID_NUMDOK##_ongetdata=true with page_.ctrl(CTRLID_NUMDOK) dim strFN : strFN = page_.root.raka_pRejestrDok.rejdok_strFormatNumeracji3 if strFN = "" or left(strFN,1) = "|" then .disable = false .value = page_.root.raka_strNrDok .tip = "Wprowadź numer dokumentu" else .disable = true if page_.root.raka_strNrDok = "" then .value = AUTONO_NAME .tip = "Numer zostanie nadany automatycznie" else .value = page_.root.raka_strNrDok .tip = "" end if end if end with end function function c##CTRLID_NUMDOK##_ondataentered(ctrl, value) c##CTRLID_NUMDOK##_ondataentered=true page_.root.raka_strNrDok = CStr(value) end function
QVE_REF_OPEN_FORM(CTRLID_UZYTKREJ,raka_pUzytRej) QVE_REF_OPEN_FORM(CTRLID_DOWKSIEG,raka_pDowodKsieg) QVE_REF_OPEN_FORM(CTRLID_SCHEMAT,raka_pSchematDekr) QVE_REF_OPEN_FORM(CTRLID_REJDOK,raka_pRejestrDok)
function assign_platnosci
dim choicelist:set choicelist = get_choicelist() dim strWhere:strWhere = "(dDataOper between " + doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(page_.root.raka_dDataOd) + " and " + doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(page_.root.raka_dDataDo) + " ) and (pRejestrDok=" + cstr(page_.root.raka_pRejestrDok.idobj) + ")" choicelist.prepare_choice_list TYPEID_N5PLATNOSC ,"Wybierz płatności","",strWhere,"","", getref("BulidPlatRow") choicelist.hide_buttons(true) choicelist.multiple
if not choicelist.domodalauto() then exit function end if
dim pParArray:set pParArray = get_choice() dim iter dim idPlat,platnosc for iter = 0 to pParArray.UpperIndex if pParArray.value(iter).generate then idPlat = pParArray.value(iter).id set platnosc = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PLATNOSC , idPlat ) set platnosc.plat_pRapKas = page_.root end if next
fill_dok_table fill_podsumowanie
end function
function fsearch() dim pSearchChoice : set pSearchChoice = doc_.getmodule(60115) pSearchChoice.addAdditionalWhere "N5RAPKAS.raka_pRejestrDok=" + CStr(page_.root.raka_pRejestrDok.idobj) fsearch = pSearchChoice.std_search(page_) set pSearchChoice = nothing end function

page.body:
QXF_BEGIN
QXS_BEGIN_FLAT(SECID_PODSTAWOWE,Informacje podstawowe,FORM_SPAN)
QXC_LABEL_REQ(Numer dokumentu ,1) QXC_EDIT_CUSTOM(CTRLID_NUMDOK,20,1)
QXC_LABEL_REQ(Data od / do,1)
QXE_DATE_FIELD(-1,raka_dDataOd) QXE_LABEL( / ) QXE_DATE_FIELD(-1,raka_dDataDo)
QXS_END_FLAT(FORM_SPAN)
QXS_BEGIN_FLAT(SECID_PLATNOSCI,Płatności,FORM_SPAN)
QXS_END_FLAT(FORM_SPAN)
QXR_SEPARATOR(FORM_SPAN)
QXS_BEGIN_OPT(SECID_REJESTRACJA,Rejestracja,FORM_SPAN)
QXC_LABEL_OPEN(CTRLID_UZYTKREJ,Wprowadził: ,1) QXC_TEXT_REF(-1,20,raka_pUzytRej,strNazwa,RCELL_SPAN)
QXR_TEXT_REF_OPEN(Rejestr dokumentów,CTRLID_REJDOK,-1,25,raka_pRejestrDok,strNazwa,RCELL_SPAN) #ifdef _IOW
QXC_LABEL_OPEN(CTRLID_DOWKSIEG,Dowód księgowy,1) QXC_EDIT_REF(-1,20,PICTURE_CHOICE_N5DOWODKSIEG,raka_pDowodKsieg,strNrDok,CRSR_DEFAULT,1) QXC_LABEL_OPEN(CTRLID_SCHEMAT,Schemat dekretacji,1) QXC_EDIT_REF(-1,50,PICTURE_CHOICE_N5SCHEMATDEKR,raka_pSchematDekr,strNazwa,CRSR_SCHEMAT_AKTYWNY_PO_REJESTRACH,1)
#else QXX_DOWOD_KSIEGOWY_SCHEMAT_OBJ(CTRLID_DOWKSIEG,-1,CTRLID_SCHEMAT,-1,raka_,1) #endif QXS_END_OPT(FORM_SPAN)
QXX_OPERATIONS(CTRLID_OPERATIONS_ROW,FORM_SPAN)
QXF_END
